{{Quote|The gizka are your problem now.|translated=1|Kurax to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], regarding the shipment of [[Gizka/Legends|gizka]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Jor Ul Kurax''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] merchant during the [[Jedi Civil War]] who mistakenly transferred Crate 42-B7, a shipment of [[Gizka/Legends|gizka]], to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''{{'s}} crew at [[Docking Bay 32]] of [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
